item.title: Jxck-S / plane-notify
item.description:
Desc: Notify If a selected plane has taken off or landed using OpenSky or ADS-B Exchange data. Compares older data to newer data to determine if a landing or takeoff has occurred. As well as nav modes, emergency squawk and resolution advisory notifications. Can output to Twitter, Discord, and Pushbullet
Lang: Python
Star: 2314

item.title: anasty17 / mirror-leech-telegram-bot
item.description:
Desc: Official Repository: Telegram bot which can download torrents, mega, google drive, telegram file and direct links + all yt-dlp supported sites, then upload them to google drive or telegram cloud. This bot supports more features like zip or extract before upload, seed after upload using qBittorrent or aria2c and many more, read features below.
Lang: Python
Star: 2045
